title: Jay Shetty and iHeartMedia Part Ways for His ‘On Purpose’ Podcast
summary: Jay Shetty’s deal with iHeartMedia for his popular “On Purpose” health and wellness podcast is coming to an end after three years on the iHeartPodcast Network. iHeartMedia originally announced its deal with Shetty for “On Purpose” in April 2023. The audio and podcast company’s current deal with She…
